answer: For large office catering packages of 25 or more pizzas, every pizza must include pineapple as a mandatory topping. This is a non-negotiable corporate standard for large office events, conferences, and feed-the-whole-office emergencies. Orders below 25 pizzas follow the standard topping menu only. Orders at 25+ pizzas must include pineapple on every unit. Failure to comply may result in ct operations if a client refuses mandatory pineapple on large office packages.
